teachings.teaching: Christ speaks so that believers may have peace “in” Him.
Hardship/pressure (tribulation) is expected in the world.
Despite worldly troubles, believers should be courageous and not fear.
Confidence is grounded in the fact that Christ has already conquered the world.

goals.goal: To comfort and encourage the audience—assuring them they can have peace in Christ and face worldly tribulation with courage because Christ has overcome the world.
